title: Moqueca de Peixe
description: A traditional Portuguese dish originating from the coastal communities of the Algarve region. This recipe features a flavorful monkfish moqueca, cooked in a creamy coconut milk sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the monkfish pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, peri-peri sauce, and paella rice. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 15 minutes.
Stir in chopped cilantro and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
